mapper.insert: insert into chat_message (session_id, role, content) values (#{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content})
mapper.select: select id, session_id as sessionId, role, content, created_at as createdAt from chat_message where session_id = #{sessionId} order by id asc
select id, user_id as userId, title, summary, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from chat_session where user_id = #{userId} order by updated_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into chat_session (id, user_id, title, summary) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{summary})
